channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 59/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 59/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 9.5%.

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Hampshire chief constable says his force ‘sorry for handcuffing and arresting’ Henry Nowak – UK politics live

item.title: BBC Politics: Scottish Secretary did not declare meeting with Mandelson's firm
